GAMMA_WALL_EXPLANATION: Gamma walls are strike prices with high open interest where dealers hedge continuously. For BABA, put wall at $125 (OI=489) creates buying support, call wall at $140 (OI=797) creates selling resistance. Our iron condor profits from price staying within this range.
